posts.text: These Asian women couldn’t even go the night they make history without being grabbed and microaggressed on National TV… in 2026. #kpopdemonhunters #audreynuna #ejae #reiami #oscars

The UN estimated it would cost $40Billion to eliminate hunger throughout the whole world for 1 year and Pete Hegseth spent more than double that in 1 month just to keep his clearly overestimated budget for next year.
